name: Comet Butterfly
description:
Queen Comet is passing the time by making another one of her amazing recipes.

Artist: gogola star

You can be anything you want: a monster, a mewman, a peasant, a knight, a king, or just a normal human—the choice is yours.

FINALLY, I finished the Star vs. It was fun making this bot series. Thank you so much to everyone who followed along! :D

Please give me feedback on my bots so I can improve them :)
